enable.label: Enable Authentication
enable.help: Enable or disable the authentication system for the admin dashboard.

usePasskeys.label: Use Passkeys
usePasskeys.help: Enable or disable passkey authentication for logging in and managing passkeys in user profiles.

loginWith.label: Login With
loginWith.help: Control what users can use to sign in. 'Email' requires an email address, 'Username' requires a user ID, and 'Both' allows either.

collection.label: Default User Collection
collection.help: The ID of the default collection that stores user data.

maxAttempts.label: Maximum Login Attempts
maxAttempts.help: Maximum number of failed login attempts before the user is temporarily locked out.

downloadMaxAttempts.label: Maximum Download Attempts
downloadMaxAttempts.help: Maximum number of download attempts per session for file downloads before access is denied.

deniedTimeout.label: Lockout Duration (Minutes)
deniedTimeout.help: Number of minutes a user is locked out after exceeding maximum login attempts.

deniedDefaultRedirect.label: Denied Access Redirect
deniedDefaultRedirect.help: The path to redirect users to when access is denied.

persistentLoginDays.label: Persistent Login Duration (Days)
persistentLoginDays.help: Number of days to keep user signed in when 'Keep me signed in' is checked.

forgotPasswordMailerId.label: Password Reset Email Template
forgotPasswordMailerId.help: Optional custom mailer ID for password reset emails. Leave empty to use the default template.

resetTokenExpiry.label: Reset Token Expiry (Minutes)
resetTokenExpiry.help: Number of minutes before a password reset token expires.
